calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Account
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Shearer, for petitioner Kimberly Walton

The Court stated that the only question was whether the time requested for compelling the accounting was too ambitious, and inquired whether 30 days would be acceptable. Mr. Shearer responded that his client could live with 30 days instead of 15, but wanted the account to be filed as soon as possible. The Court granted the Petition to Compel Account (subject to review of the order), but stated he might change the date for production of the account.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy K. Kabasares. (Not Reported)
